DESCRIPTION: Batch Data Warehouse (Star Schema): Best practices: VARIANT for JSON staging, Serverless Tasks for transforms, SCD Type 2 for dimensions, Clustered fact tables by date, Secure Views for data marts, Dynamic Masking and Row Access Policies, isolated warehouses (WH_LOADING, WH_TRANSFORM, WH_BI_ANALYTICS), Multi-Cluster with Standard scaling for BI.
